input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.8.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.8.2
            TITLE: the main hoop must extend from the lowest frame member / bottom of monocoque on one

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.8.2: The Main Hoop must extend from the lowest Frame Member / bottom of Monocoque on one
F.5.8.2 The Main Hoop must extend from the lowest Frame Member / bottom of Monocoque on one 
side of the Frame, up, over and down to the lowest Frame Member / bottom of Monocoque 
on the other side of the Frame.

final_answer: The Main Hoop must extend from the lowest Frame Member / bottom of Monocoque on one side of the Frame, up, over and down to the lowest Frame Member / bottom of Monocoque on the other side of the Frame.
